Use the **title** field (above) for: **🐛 [Fix]** + short description. Do not repeat it here.

## 📌 Version affected

Which version(s) have the bug / are fixed by this PR? (e.g. `1.2.x`, `2.0.0`, or "All versions before this PR")

## 📝 Description

- What was broken / what was fixed
- Why the change was necessary
- Any technical details worth noting

## 💥 Issues

Document any known issues, limitations, or pending concerns.

## 🌟 Impact

- **UX:** How it affects user experience
- **Performance:** Any performance implications
- **Security:** Security-related impacts
- **Maintenance:** Effects on code maintainability

## ℹ️ Additional information

Include any supplementary information, setup instructions, or context that reviewers should know.

## 🏞️ Demo

Include relevant screenshots, GIFs, or video links demonstrating the fix.
